stimulus_hint: pinch the probe between wet fingers
extra_context: Capacitive soil moisture probe, analog OUT wired to GP28 (the free ADC — 26 is the pot, 27 is the LDR). Report moisture as a percentage 0..100 of full scale: average 8 raw u16 reads from machine.ADC(28).read_u16() and return round(raw * 100 / 65535, 1). Plain RP2040 MicroPython only — no ESP32 APIs like .atten() or .width().
